task_completion.description: Open the Nx Witness Desktop Client
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Nx Witness Desktop Client application window is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Create and name the layout 'Gate Monitor'
task_completion.visual_evidence: A layout tab or resource tree item is visible with the exact name 'Gate Monitor'.

task_completion.description: Add the first instance of 'Parking Lot Camera'
task_completion.visual_evidence: A video panel displaying the 'Parking Lot Camera' feed is present in the layout.

task_completion.description: Add the second instance of 'Parking Lot Camera' side-by-side
task_completion.visual_evidence: Two separate video panels, both displaying the 'Parking Lot Camera' feed, are visible side-by-side in the layout.

task_completion.description: Apply digital zoom to one camera instance to show an ROI
task_completion.visual_evidence: One of the 'Parking Lot Camera' panels shows a noticeably zoomed-in or cropped view (Region of Interest), while the other panel shows the full wide-angle view.
The 'Gate Monitor' layout tab does not show an unsaved changes indicator (e.g., an asterisk), or a save action/dialog is visible in the final steps.

integrity.description: Agent used the Nx Witness GUI to create the layout
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking through the Nx Witness Desktop Client interface rather than just executing terminal commands.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the real Nx Witness software
integrity.visual_evidence: The standard Nx Witness Desktop Client UI is visible, not a text editor, mock interface, or web browser.

integrity.description: Agent did not bypass the GUI using API scripts
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no evidence of the agent running python scripts or curl commands in the terminal to interact with the /rest/v1/layouts API directly to complete the task.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target layout name: 'Gate Monitor'. Target camera name: 'Parking Lot Camera'. The layout must contain exactly 2 items (instances of the camera). One instance must be a full wide-angle view, and the other must be digitally zoomed (ROI).
